name: Acorn Squash and Orange Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 Medium acorn squash in halves (seeds and membranes removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the acorn squash, cut side down, in a baking dish.
2. Bake at 300 degrees for 45 minutes.
3. Simmer the sauce for 30 minutes.
4. Spoon 1/3 of the sauce over each piece of acorn squash.
5. Return to the oven and bake until tender, approximately 30 more minutes.
6. Broil until browned.
